prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次6693名、2026年计划大幅缩招24.8%（竞争加剧）、学校声誉与抖音热 度双高（吸引更多考生）、物理类考生总数小幅下降（缓和竞争）等多因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年明显前移；预测最低位次约5748名，区间5248–6248名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 5081 → 4771 → 9199 → 7342 → 6693. In 2023, due to a significant drop in the provincial control line (undergraduate first batch 480 points), the ranking plummeted to 9199, then gradually recovered to 6693 in 2024–2025. Over the past two years, the ranking has moved forward by about 2506 places, with a baseline of approximately 6693 in 2025. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 93 in 2021, 94 in 2022, 92 in 2023, 96 in 2024, and 109 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 82 students, a decrease of 27 from 2025 (a reduction of about 24.8%), significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 31st (stable at 29–32 in recent years), belonging to the top tier of national universities. In 2026, there are no negative reputation records for Hunan University, and overall reputation remains stable. It ranks 16th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting high attention from applicants. There is no history of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 8 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Civil Engineering A-, Applied Economics A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, and Computer Science and Technology A-, showing balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., are all highly recommended popular majors, highly matching the university's enrollment majors, boosting application heat. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shanxi Province is about 167,000, a decrease of about 3.4% from 2025, slightly easing competition. Hunan University is located in Changsha (central region), with a relatively small enrollment plan share in Shanxi Province (109 in 2025 out of national total), so cross-provincial application is limitedly affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 6693, a significant 24.8% reduction in the 2026 plan (intensified competition), high university reputation and Douyin popularity (attracting more applicants), and a slight decrease in the total number of physics category examinees (easing competition), the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to move forward significantly compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5748, with a range of 5248–6248.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5248–6248, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5248), you can focus on aiming for flagship majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>6248), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options and pay attention to lower-ranking majors within Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 767 → 702 → 2215 → 1132 → 894. In 2023, due to a significant drop in the provincial control line (first batch 490 points), the ranking sharply fell to 2215, then recovered to 894 in 2024–2025. Over the past two years, the ranking has moved forward by about 1321 places, with a baseline of approximately 894 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 41, an increase of 24 (about 141% expansion) compared to 2025, significantly reducing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 31st in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, placing it among the top universities nationwide. Ranked 16th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. No history of admission gaps. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 894, a significant 141% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan (substantially reducing competition), a 25.6% decrease in the total number of history category examinees (further easing competition), and high university reputation and Douyin popularity (attracting applicants), the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to drop significantly compared to 2025.
